channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [GULPOLY] GPL Appoints NeoAtlas Capital Advisory as IR Advisor
item.description:
Gulshan Polyols Ltd (GPL) has appointed NeoAtlas Capital Advisory LLP, operating under the brand name Atlas Capital, as its "Investor Relations and Strategic Communications Advisor." This appointment is effective from April 15, 2026. The company states that this engagement is intended to strengthen its investor engagement framework, enhance transparency, and align its capital markets communication with evolving institutional expectations. NeoAtlas Capital Advisory LLP will provide support for GPL's investor outreach and communication initiatives.

  • GPL appointed NeoAtlas Capital as its IR advisor.
  • The appointment is effective from April 15, 2026.
  • Aims to strengthen investor engagement and transparency.
  • NeoAtlas will support investor outreach and communication.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GULSHAN POLYOLS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [FRONTSP] Frontier Springs Independent Director Nimesh Mukerji Passes Away
item.description:
Frontier Springs Ltd. announced the sad demise of Mr. Nimesh Mukerji, an Independent Director (DIN: 07705885), on April 14, 2026, due to cancer. The company was informed today, April 15, 2026. His passing is considered an irreparable loss to the company, and the directors and employees have extended their deep sympathy and condolences to his family. The necessary disclosures have been made under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosures Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Independent Director Nimesh Mukerji passed away on April 14, 2026.
  • His demise was due to cancer, as informed by the company.
  • The company views his passing as an irreparable loss.
  • Disclosure made under SEBI (LODR) Regulation 30.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FRONTIER SPRINGS LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [DESHRAK] Desh Rakshak Aushdhalaya Board Approves Branch Office Expansion
item.description:
Desh Rakshak Aushdhalaya Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on April 15, 2026, approved a proposal to establish new branch offices. This expansion includes setting up branches in other parts of India and also outside India. Both initiatives are contingent upon receiving the necessary regulatory and statutory approvals. The decision aims to broaden the company's operational footprint, as intimated under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Board approved setting up branch offices within India.
  • Board also approved setting up branch offices outside India.
  • All expansion plans are subject to regulatory approvals.
  • Decision made at the board meeting on April 15, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DESH RAKSHAK AUSHDHALAYA LTD. | Category: Expansion

item.title: [DESHRAK] Desh Rakshak Aushdhalaya changes RTA to Nivis Corpserve LLP
item.description:
Desh Rakshak Aushdhalaya Ltd's Board of Directors approved a change in the company's Registrar and Share Transfer Agent (RTA) from M/s. MAS Services Limited to M/s. Nivis Corpserve LLP. The decision was made in a board meeting held on April 15, 2026, after evaluating various parameters in the best interest of the company and its shareholders. The effective date for this change will be intimated to the Stock Exchange later, following the completion of definitive agreements, data transition, electronic connectivity shifting, and necessary confirmations from NSDL and CDSL.

  • Board approved RTA change on April 15, 2026.
  • New RTA appointed is M/s. Nivis Corpserve LLP.
  • Previous RTA was M/s. MAS Services Limited.
  • Effective date to be announced post-completion of formalities.
  • Change made in the best interest of the company and shareholders.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DESH RAKSHAK AUSHDHALAYA LTD. | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [DESHRAK] Desh Rakshak Aushdhalaya re-appoints Aman Parashar as Internal Auditor
item.description:
Desh Rakshak Aushdhalaya Ltd. announced the re-appointment of Mr. Aman Parashar as the Internal Auditor for the financial year 2026-2027. The Board of Directors approved this re-appointment in a meeting held on April 15, 2026. Mr. Parashar holds a master's degree in Banking and Finance and possesses relevant experience in audit, accounting, and taxation. The re-appointment complies with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Board re-appointed Mr. Aman Parashar as Internal Auditor.
  • Appointment is for the financial year 2026-2027.
  • Mr. Parashar holds a Master's in Banking and Finance.
  • He has experience in audit, accounting, and taxation.
  • Decision made at board meeting on April 15, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DESH RAKSHAK AUSHDHALAYA LTD. | Category: Auditor

item.title: [UML] Umiya Mobile opens 5 new retail stores in Gujarat & Maharashtra
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Umiya Mobile Limited announced the opening of five new retail stores, expanding its presence across Gujarat and Maharashtra. All five stores commenced operations on April 15, 2026. One new store is located in Sutrapada, Gujarat. The remaining four new outlets are situated in various cities across Maharashtra, specifically in Beed, Amravati, Hingoli, and Ahilyanagar. This strategic expansion aims to strengthen the company's retail footprint and reach a broader customer base in key regional markets.

  • Umiya Mobile opened five new retail stores.
  • New stores are located in Gujarat and Maharashtra.
  • All outlets commenced operations on April 15, 2026.
  • Expansion strengthens the company's retail footprint.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Umiya Mobile Ltd | Category: Expansion

item.title: [DESHRAK] Desh Rakshak Board Approves Auditor, RTA Change, & Branch Expansion
item.description:
Desh Rakshak Aushdhalaya Ltd's Board of Directors met on April 15, 2026, approving several key matters. These include the re-appointment of Mr. Aman Parashar as the Internal Auditor for FY 2026-2027 and a change in the Registrar and Share Transfer Agent from M/s. MAS Services Limited to M/s. Nivis Corpserve LLP. The Board also approved proposals for setting up new branch offices both within India and internationally, subject to regulatory approvals. Additionally, related party transactions were considered and approved, and the trading window was closed for designated persons from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the Q4/FY26 audited financial results.

  • Board re-appointed Mr. Aman Parashar as Internal Auditor for FY27.
  • Approved change in Registrar and Share Transfer Agent to Nivis Corpserve LLP.
  • Proposals for setting up domestic and international branch offices approved.
  • Related party transactions for the company were considered and approved.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, for Q4/FY26 results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DESH RAKSHAK AUSHDHALAYA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title:
[ASTERDM] Aster DM: Kerala nurse strike ends, operations resume;
₹5.77 Cr revenue loss
item.description:
Aster DM Healthcare announced the resolution of the nurse strike across its Kerala hospitals. Following extensive engagement with the United Nurses Association and directives from the Hon'ble High Court, which extended the strike deferral until May 31, 2026, all nursing staff have returned to work, and operations have resumed at full capacity. The company incurred an additional revenue loss of ₹5,77,60,948 due to the strike but expects no further losses if the current status quo holds. The High Court proceedings for a final settlement between the Kerala Private Hospital Association and United Nurses Association are ongoing. Aster DM had implemented contingency measures, including mobilizing nurses from other states, to ensure critical services.

  • Nurse strike at Aster DM's Kerala hospitals has ended.
  • All nursing staff have returned; operations are at full capacity.
  • Company incurred ₹5.77 crore in additional revenue loss.
  • No further revenue loss expected if current status quo continues.
  • High Court proceedings for final settlement are ongoing.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aster DM Healthcare Ltd | Category: Disruption

item.title: [TCS] TCS & UC Launch 'My First AI Job' Program for Entry-Level AI Careers
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Tata Consultancy Services (TCS), in partnership with the University of Cincinnati and Salesforce, has launched the "TCS My First AI Job" skills training program. This exclusive program is designed to equip final-year students with AI solutions certification, paid work experience, and a direct pathway to full-time roles at TCS upon graduation. The intensive three-month curriculum covers essential technical, communication, and employability skills through hands-on projects, mentorship, and global certifications. The initiative aims to bridge the gap between academic learning and workforce readiness, fostering a future-ready American workforce. This collaboration aligns with TCS's strategy to develop local talent, strengthen its Salesforce ecosystem, and meet the evolving AI-driven needs of its U.S. clients, building on its recent establishment of a Salesforce Center of Excellence in Ohio and acquisitions of Coastal Cloud and ListEngage.

  • TCS launched "My First AI Job" program with University of Cincinnati and Salesforce.
  • Program offers AI skills certification, paid work experience, and full-time roles at TCS.
  • Aims to bridge academic-workforce gap and build future-ready AI talent in the US.
  • Strengthens TCS's Salesforce ecosystem and commitment to US client needs.
  • Supports TCS's goal to be a leading AI-led technology services company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TATA CONSULTANCY SERVICES LTD. | Category: Partnership

item.title: [EASEMYTRIP] Easy Trip Planners Promoter Nishant Pitti pledges 6.86 Cr shares (1.89% capital)
item.description:
Easy Trip Planners Ltd promoter, Mr. Nishant Pitti, has disclosed the creation of a pledge on 6,86,40,589 equity shares, representing 1.89% of the company's total share capital. These shares constitute 25.85% of Mr. Pitti's total promoter shareholding. The pledge was created on March 24, 2026, in favor of Motilal Oswal Financial Services Limited, and the borrowed amount is intended for personal use by the promoter.

  • Promoter Nishant Pitti pledged 6,86,40,589 Easy Trip Planners shares.
  • Pledged shares represent 1.89% of total company share capital.
  • This constitutes 25.85% of the promoter's total shareholding.
  • The pledge is in favor of Motilal Oswal Financial Services Limited.
  • The borrowed amount is for the promoter's personal use.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Easy Trip Planners Ltd | Category: Shareholding
